title: Cuneiform Tablet #0487: Old Babylonian Medical
description: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a medical document preserved on clay.
introduction: A cuneiform tablet from the Old Babylonian period — a medical document preserved on clay.

translation.text: Cuneiform tablet of the Old Babylonian period. Medical document. Inscribed on clay in cuneiform script. The tablet records medical matters typical of Old Babylonian period administrative or literary practice.
